name: education digest: a delta tagged new_technology appears in the new technologies section
command:
cat > d.jsonl <<'JEOF'
{"source_id":"terraform-docs","section_id":"stacks","pillar":"operational-excellence","curriculum_phase":"4","delta_class":"new_technology","summary":"Terraform Stacks GA","fetched_at":"2026-06-08T00:00:00Z"}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/curriculum-digest.sh" --deltas d.jsonl --out-dir out --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out/2026-06-08T120000Z.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.new_technology.length===1 && j.new_technology[0].summary==="Terraform Stacks GA"?0:1)' && echo newtech-ok 1>&2
